summary: Walk In Wardrobe - Transition Area (Flooring & Joinery)

items.name: Walls (Cream Emulsion)
items.description: Emulsioned cream/off-white walls visible on all sides. No scuffs, marks or stains to paint finish.

items.name: Skirting Boards (Cream Painted Woodwork)
items.description: Painted wood skirting boards matching wall tone or slightly darker cream shade. Sound condition with no damage to edges or joints.

items.name: Door Architraves (White Painted Woodwork)
items.description: Architraves to door openings painted white matching wall tone or slightly lighter shade. Sound condition with no damage.

items.name: Internal Doors (White Painted Woodwork)
items.description: Two internal doors visible: one closed right side of P175 and one open left side shown in close-up Image 3. White painted surface with black lever handles and locks.
defects: scuffs mid level right hand side exterior (visible on edge of door near lock cylinder)

items.name: Flooring (Stone Effect Tiles)
items.description: Grey/white stone-effect tiled flooring visible in P175/P180 and bottom right corner of P176. Grey grout lines.
defects: glazing not clean (if applicable to windows - none seen here)
dust/dirt in corners or crevices if visible, otherwise 'none'

items.name: Socket Plate (Black Square Design)
items.description: Single black square socket/switch plate mounted on wall between door frames in P175.

items.name: Internal Walls
items.description: White emulsion painted walls visible in corner junctions and along the perimeter of this section. Surfaces are smooth with standard paint finish.

items.name: Skirting Boards
items.description: White painted skirting boards (approx. 75-100mm height) running along the base of walls and door frames.
defects: No visible scuffs, chips or marks to paintwork at knee level.

items.name: Door Frames / Architraves
items.description: White painted timber or composite frames surrounding doorways/openings to this room.
defects: No damage, cracks or paint peeling visible on reveals.

items.name: Flooring - Carpet (Grey Neutral)
items.description: Neutral grey pile carpet covering the majority of this section.
defects: Shadows cast across surface due to lighting/person standing in room (P182, P183). No visible stains or burns.

items.name: Flooring - Wood Effect Laminate/Vinyl (Light Oak)
items.description: Wood effect flooring with a light oak/beige finish visible in the adjacent area.
defects: No scratches, scuffs or wear marks on surface shown.

items.name: Threshold Strip / Sill (Metal Profile)
items.description: Aluminum or metal profile separating the carpet area from the wood effect flooring.
defects: Lip is intact with no damage to finish. Clean of debris/dust accumulation at lip level.

items.name: Built-in Wardrobe Units / Cabinetry
items.description: Light wood effect built-in units (drawers/cupboards) visible in the background of P182/P183.
defects: Surfaces clean, no marks on panels or handles.

items.name: Wardrobe Unit - Doors
items.description: Two doors hinged to open outwards, finished in wood-effect laminate matching internal shelving.

items.name: Wardrobe Unit - Internal Shelving & Side Panels
items.description: Fixed internal shelving and side panels finished in grey/brown wood-effect laminate.

items.name: Hanging Rail
items.description: Metal hanging rail with plastic glides, mounted to internal shelving.

items.name: Hangers (Pink)
items.description: Plastic/wire hangers in pink.

items.name: Bedding/Pillows (White)
items.description: Quilted white fabric pillow or folded bedding stored on top shelf.

items.name: Carpeted Flooring
items.description: Patterned carpet flooring visible at base of wardrobe unit.

items.name: Wardrobe Unit - Hinges (Silver)
items.description: Metal hinges attaching doors to frame.
